subagents.name: general
subagents.description: A versatile agent designed for researching complex problems, searching code, and executing multi-step tasks.

subagents.name: Verifier
subagents.description: Built-in subagent that provides quick code checks. Simply @ it during your coding tasks.

subagents.name: fast-context
subagents.description: Optimized for quickly pinpointing code locations and gathering contextual evidence, specialized for codebase indexing.

subagents.name: Verdent-helper
subagents.description: Your Verdent assistant for documentation and usage guidance. @Verdent-helper it when you have questions about Verdent features.

subagents.name: Reviewer
subagents.description: Reviewer finds errors, edge cases, and risks in your code, with suggested fixes.

subagents.name: Multi-model-planner
subagents.description: Orchestrates the configured planning models to collaborate, cross-validate, and deliver stronger planning strategies.
